name: @mitriyweb/agent-team
description: Autonomous AI development team — drop into any project and let agents work through your roadmap.
author: Mitriyweb

scripts.fix: bun run lint:fix && bun run check:fix
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run check && bun run typecheck && bun run knip && bun run test
scripts.build: mkdir -p tmp && cd tmp && bun build ../bin/init.ts --compile --outfile ../dist/agent-team
scripts.build:linux-x64: mkdir -p tmp && cd tmp && bun build ../bin/init.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile ../dist/agent-team-linux-x64
scripts.build:linux-arm64: mkdir -p tmp && cd tmp && bun build ../bin/init.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile ../dist/agent-team-linux-arm64
scripts.build:darwin-arm64: mkdir -p tmp && cd tmp && bun build ../bin/init.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile ../dist/agent-team-darwin-arm64
scripts.build:darwin-x64: mkdir -p tmp && cd tmp && bun build ../bin/init.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile ../dist/agent-team-darwin-x64
scripts.build:all: bun run build:linux-x64 && bun run build:linux-arm64 && bun run build:darwin-arm64 && bun run build:darwin-x64
